title: Semantic map readability and visible pawn state layer
summary: Make the world view read as a game map with semantic terrain/building/lamp/dark-area cues and visible idle, moving, working, blocked and completed pawn states.
acceptance: Map reads as a game surface, not abstract wallpaper: roads, buildings/structures, lamp coverage, dark gaps, blocked areas and selectable objects have distinct semantic visuals
Pawn visuals expose at least idle, moving, working, blocked and completed states with status labels or icons suitable for low-fidelity placeholder art
Selected target, hover target, intent/path preview, job marker and progress affordances are visually distinct and accessible without relying on color alone
Renderer state remains a projection of read-model data and does not mutate authoritative world state
Render and geometry tests cover entity/pawn state projection, marker placement and viewport behavior

history.details: Added read-model semantic map overlays and visible pawn state projection; Pixi now renders semantic areas, focus markers, paths, target markers, and progress from fixture-driven read-model data; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; verified optional read-model projection fields, fixture-driven semantic map and five pawn states, renderer-only Pixi consumption, distinct non-color-only overlays/markers, no command/Worker/sim-core/public-release boundary changes, WM-0135 artifact absent; sampled geometry/typecheck/handoff/validate/diff-check pass.

Verified by independent reviewer; integration gate sampled typecheck, render geometry tests, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status and git diff --check; implementation report records web-shell e2e and quality passing.

review.summary: No blocking findings; verified optional read-model projection fields, fixture-driven semantic map and five pawn states, renderer-only Pixi consumption, distinct non-color-only overlays/markers, no command/Worker/sim-core/public-release boundary changes, WM-0135 artifact absent; sampled geometry/typecheck/handoff/validate/diff-check pass.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; integration gate sampled typecheck, render geometry tests, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status and git diff --check; implementation report records web-shell e2e and quality passing.
